testcase.name: setGraduationYearWithoutBachelorsCreditsTest
testcase.system-out: Calling new Student( ) Calling setStartYear( 2011 ) Calling setTitleOfThesis( 0, "Dreaming Christmas New" ) Calling setTitleOfThesis( 1, "Survive Year Ending Dreaming Purpose" ) Calling setGraduationYear( 2026 ) Verifying that "Check amount of required credits" matches the expected pattern ""?Check\s+(the\s+)?amount\s+of\s+required\s+credits[.!"]*" ✓ Calling getGraduationYear( ) ✓

testcase.name: setGraduationYearWithoutMastersThesisTitleTest
